content: الرَّاجِل دَه مَ بِبَطَّل يِعِيد في كَلَّامُه
translations: eng:this guy won't stop repeating what he is saying

transcriptions.arabizi: ilraagil dah ma|bibattal|sh yiAayd fi kallaem|uh
